prestazioni: Engine: EJ204 (2.0L DOHC naturally aspirated, 160 PS stock) – Full forged internals upgrade with Manley 87mm forged pistons, Eagle H-beam connecting rods, and ACL Race Series bearings for 9.5:1 compression ratio, paired with a Tomei 264°/260° camshaft set and Tomei Type-M valve springs for high-RPM stability up to 8,500 RPM.

Forced Induction: Custom-built turbo system using a Garrett GT2860RS-5 turbocharger (0.64 A/R turbine housing) with a custom 3-inch stainless steel exhaust manifold by HKS, mated to a GReddy intercooler core (400x200x60mm) and custom aluminum piping with HKS SSQV4 blow-off valve. Supporting mods include a Walbro 255 LPH fuel pump, ID1000x injectors, and a Cobb Accessport V3 flashed with a custom Stage 2+ tune by Top Secret Japan for 280 WHP on 98 RON fuel.

Drivetrain: STI 6-speed manual transmission swap with a Cusco Type-RS 2-way limited-slip differential, reinforced with a PPG close-ratio gear set (2.355 1st, 1.750 2nd, 1.370 3rd). Clutch system upgraded to a Tilton 7.25-inch twin-disc setup with a lightweight flywheel and ACT Prolite pressure plate for rapid engagement.
estetica: Body Kit: Rocket Bunny V1 Casa Blanca-specific widebody kit (JDM-only release) with carbon fiber front fenders, rear quarter panels, and a custom rear diffuser. Front bumper modified with a Seibon carbon fiber lip and integrated C-West canards for aero stability.

Wheels & Stance: Work Meister S1 3P 17x8.5 +38 front and 17x9.5 +35 rear in Hyper Silver, wrapped in Yokohama Advan Neova AD08R 225/45/17 and 255/40/17 tires. Suspension lowered with Tein Flex Z coilovers (custom valved for Casa Blanca chassis) with Cusco pillowball upper mounts and Whiteline adjustable sway bars (22mm front, 18mm rear).

Interior & Details: Full Bride Leggenda II reclining bucket seats with Takata 4-point harnesses, wrapped in custom Alcantara with red stitching. Dashboard and door cards retrimmed in matching Alcantara by Auto Trim Design Japan. Engine bay detailed with a custom carbon fiber strut brace by C-West, a Cusco front tower bar, and a relocated battery to the trunk with a lightweight lithium-ion unit from Antigravity.
